title: The Raizo Question
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on the raizo question within the Take Me With You storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Heeey!! Luffy!! zoro!!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: How's Pekoms ...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ah! Chopper!! He's in pain, slamming his head against the wall and shouting!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hurry up and heal him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: EHHH?! What the heck kinda symptoms are those?! I'll come take a look!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oooh! So you're the rumored straw hat Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I've been wanting to meetcha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ehhhhhhhhh?! Why are you following us?! get back to bed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Well, it just so happens I'm all better now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Like hell you are!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Whoa, he's Huuge!! Is that nekomamushi? He's like a big monster cat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: A gratitude Garuchuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: BFWG H!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: DWAAA AGH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Neko- Manushi is bleeding all over-!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What the hell are you doing, you damn monster cat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Gya haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha haha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What's this ruckus about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We don't have enough blood!! Someone go get some blood for me, stat!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Yes, Doctor Chopper (1)

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Gasp!! th... th... thank... that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Get your ass up, Monster Cat!! I'll skin your mangy_hide!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ahh! Tora- Guy..!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Is that your crew-??!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's right. I brought them here to intro- duce them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: All 20 members of my crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: pleased to make your acquaintance, "Straw hat"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We've got something to talk about.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Sure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ruuu- WUUude !!!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Totally dissing us, Captain?! Ruuude!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They're nothing more than allies. You don't have any need to get along with them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Black leg-ya has gone to big mom's place....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Right.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And how the hell did things even end up that way?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Like I said!! I'm going to bring him back right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So could you just kinda hang on a little on the fight with Kaidou?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hang in there!! nekomamush!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Anyone knows

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Whether we wait or not, it's only a matter of time before Kaidou himself comes after us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We were supposed to be able to hide our- selves here on Zou for a while...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But it seems our location here is being discovered.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: HRMMM...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And that means next they'll be coming after us!! If it gets attacked by them again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Just WHAT do you think is going to hap- pen to this country?!

summary: The Raizo Question: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
